Reckless Drivin' WASM Port GitHub

Reckless Drivin' – WebAssembly Port

A fan-made SDL2 / Emscripten port of the classic Mac OS 9 racing game Reckless Drivin' by Jonas Echterhoff. Click inside the canvas and press Enter to start.

Game Loading…

Downloading game data…

Controls: ↑ Accelerate   ↓ Brake   ←→ Steer   Space Handbrake   Z Mine   X Missile   Esc Menu
Reckless Drivin' © Jonas Echterhoff  ·  SDL2/WASM port by LachlanBWWright
